languages.text: "Будь осторож{mf|ен|на}. элантах. Этот путь ведет прямиком в западню, расставленную огирами. Злой разум, что правит этим местом, поджидает нас наверху, и нам потребуются все силы, чтобы выстоять".
"Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."
languages.original_text: "Будь осторож{mf|ен|на}. элантах. Этот путь ведет прямиком в западню, расставленную огирами. Злой разум, что правит этим местом, поджидает нас наверху, и нам потребуются все силы, чтобы выстоять".

traits.locale_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."
"Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."
"Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

languages.text: « Méfiez-vous, elantach. Cette voie mène droit dans un piège tendu par l'Oghyr. L'esprit maléfique qui règne sur ces lieux nous attend au sommet, et il nous faudra puiser dans toutes nos forces pour lui résister. »
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

traits.locale_text: « Méfiez-vous, elantach. Cette voie mène droit dans un piège tendu par l'Oghyr. L'esprit maléfique qui règne sur ces lieux nous attend au sommet, et il nous faudra puiser dans toutes nos forces pour lui résister. »

languages.text: «Cuidado, elantach. Este camino conduce directamente a una trampa que nos han tendido los oghyr. La pérfida mente maestra que gobierna este lugar nos espera en la cima, y necesitaremos todo nuestro brío para enfrentarnos a él».
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

traits.locale_text: «Cuidado, elantach. Este camino conduce directamente a una trampa que nos han tendido los oghyr. La pérfida mente maestra que gobierna este lugar nos espera en la cima, y necesitaremos todo nuestro brío para enfrentarnos a él».

languages.text: “小心些，外界人。遗落者在这条路的前方为我们设下了陷阱。统治此地的邪恶意志正在顶端等候，我们需要全力以赴才能与之抗衡。”
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

traits.locale_text: “小心些，外界人。遗落者在这条路的前方为我们设下了陷阱。统治此地的邪恶意志正在顶端等候，我们需要全力以赴才能与之抗衡。”

languages.text: "Seid vorsichtig, Elantach. Dieser Weg führt direkt in eine Falle des Oghyr. Der böse Verstand, der diesen Ort beherrscht, wartet oben auf uns, und es wird unserer gesamten Kraft bedürfen, ihm zu trotzen."
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

traits.locale_text: "Seid vorsichtig, Elantach. Dieser Weg führt direkt in eine Falle des Oghyr. Der böse Verstand, der diesen Ort beherrscht, wartet oben auf uns, und es wird unserer gesamten Kraft bedürfen, ihm zu trotzen."

languages.text: "Dikkatli ol elantach. Bu yol, doğrudan Oghyr tuzağına çıkıyor. Burayı yöneten kötücül zihin bizi tepede bekliyor. Ona karşı koymak için tüm gücümüzü kullanmamız gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."

traits.locale_text: "Dikkatli ol elantach. Bu yol, doğrudan Oghyr tuzağına çıkıyor. Burayı yöneten kötücül zihin bizi tepede bekliyor. Ona karşı koymak için tüm gücümüzü kullanmamız gerekecek."

languages.text: 「気をつけろ、エランタ。この道はオグイールの仕掛けた罠に直結している。この場所を支配する邪悪な心は、我々を待ち構えている。我々の全力を尽くしても、彼に耐えるのは容易ではないだろう」
languages.original_text: "Be careful, elantach. This path leads straight into a trap set by the Oghyr. The evil mind that rules this place is waiting for us at the top, and it will take all our strength to withstand him."
